positive: A highly stylized, abstract celestial forest scene, featuring bioluminescent flora and large, stylized moons and planetary rings. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed for maximum impact on apparel. Utilize clean silhouettes and strong negative space contrast, rendered in a deep midnight blue and vibrant neon teal color palette with accents of glowing gold. The style should mimic detailed linocut mixed with vaporwave aesthetics, ensuring crisp edges, deep saturation, and suitable scaling for a repeatable pattern feel. Vector graphic quality, high contrast, centered focal point.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, logo, lowres, grain, artifacts, poor anatomy, dirty, grayscale, messy lines, copyright, trademark
